uin_code.source_quote: Star Health Premier Insurance Policy Unique Identification No.: SHAHLIP22226V012122

min_entry_age.source_quote: For Adults: Min - 50 years for primary member & Max - Up to Any Age (Oldest member will be consider as primary member)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Eligibility ● For Adults: Min - 50 years for primary member & Max - Up to Any Age (Oldest member will be consider as primary member)
max_entry_age._note: There is explicitly NO maximum adult entry age — the policy states 'Max - Up to Any Age'; value left null because no finite numeric cap exists (not because the data is missing)

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: For Dependent Children: Min - 91 days & Max - Up to 25 years

grace_period.source_quote: the policy shall terminate and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days to maintain continuity of beneﬁts without break in policy.

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document whether electronically or otherwise to review the terms and conditions of the policy, and to return the same if not acceptable.

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the ﬁrst policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst policy with insurer.
pre_existing_disease_waiting_months._reconciliation: Bug #44: authoritative Excl01 PED waiting = 24 months confirmed. No change; reconciled with corrected base.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst policy with us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an accident.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 9. Pre-hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 60 days immediately before the insured person is hospitalized.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post Hospitalization Expenses: Medical expenses incurred up to 90 days immediately after the insured person is discharged from the hospital.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 14,000+ network hospitals across India (per official Star Health communications, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Co-payment (Applicable for Insured persons whose age at the time of entry is above 65 years): Each and every claim under the Policy shall be subject to a Copayment of 20% applicable to claim amount admissible and payable as per the terms and conditions of the Policy even for renewals.

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: Policy Term - One year / Two years / Three years: For policies more than one year, the Sum Insured is for each year, without any carry over beneﬁt thereof.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 11. Organ Donor Expenses: In patient hospitalization expenses incurred for organ transplantation from the Donor to the Recipient Insured Person are payable provided the claim for transplantation is payable

restoration_benefit.source_quote: automatic restoration of the Sum Insured once by 100% subject to the following; 1

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: health checkup reports: If following medical records of the person proposed for insurance are submitted, Company may offer a discount of 10% on the applicable premium, subjec

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus: The insured person will be eligible for Cumulative bonus calculated at 20% of sum insured for each claim free year subject to a maximum of 100% of the sum insured

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: indemnity health insurance product which covers expenses incurred for hospitalisation due to Illness or Accident. This policy has been devised as the result of our meticulous research to provide the much needed protection to the individuals who are 50 year

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus: The insured person will be eligible for Cumulative bonus calculated at 20% of sum insured for each claim free year subject to a maximum of 100% of the sum insured
